name: list-segment-builder
description: Use when the user asks to "build email segments from my list", "make engaged / lapsed / RFM segments", "set up cart-abandoner or lifecycle-stage audiences", or "build a suppression list of unsubscribes and bounces"; turns the user''s OWN list/CRM/GA4/ecommerce export into behavioral, attribute, and lifecycle-stage segments plus a suppression list, with per-segment sizes labeled Measured/Estimated, informing the SEND E (Engagement/targeting) dimension. Not for scoring EQS or running vetoes — use
author: aaron-he-zhu
